treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Nucleus 24M CI was inserted except five electrodes
treatment_information.treatment_response: No complications were encountered. Both patients responded to acoustic stimuli, and their speech perception skills were improved.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Performed at the beginning of the surgery due to severe symptoms of airway obstruction

treatment_timeline.event: Cochlear implantation performed on the right ear
Adenoidectomy performed due to severe symptoms of airway obstruction
Postoperative CT scan showed electrode array was in the cochlea

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Fitted 4 weeks after the operation using SPEAK strategy. All electrodes in the cochlea were activated.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Their results seem encouraging after 10 months of cochlear implant use.
